sqlMap.select: SELECT devSeq, devId, devType, subType, userId, token, badge, tenantId, state, pushState, regDate, isLogin, startMenu, loginTime, loginLock, isPasswordChange, extension1, extension2 FROM tbl_dev_master WHERE devId = #devId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_DEV_MASTER ( devId, devType, subType, userId, token, badge, tenantId, state, pushState, regDate, isLogin, startMenu, loginTime, loginLock, isPasswordChange, extension1, extension2 ) VALUES ( #devId#, #devType#, #subType#, #userId#, #token#, #badge#, #tenantId#, #state#, #pushState#, #regDate#, #isLogin#, #startMenu#, #loginTime#, #loginLock#, #isPasswordChange#, #extension1#, #extension2# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_DEV_MASTER SET devType = #devType#, subType = #subType#, userId = #userId#, token = #token#, badge = #badge#, tenantId = #tenantId#, state = #state#, pushState = #pushState#, isLogin = #isLogin#, startMenu = #startMenu#, loginTime = #loginTime#, loginLock = #loginLock#, isPasswordChange = #isPasswordChange#, extension1 = #extension1#, extension2 = #extension2# WHERE devId = #devId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(USER_ID) FROM tbl_user_config tuc WHERE USER_ID = #id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'otpKey' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM tbl_user_config tuc WHERE USER_ID = #id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'otpKey' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, mobile, extensionattribute5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as roleId, upnname, MANUAL_FLAG AS MANUALFLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE (cn = #id# OR extensionattribute14 = #id#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
and department = NVL(#deptID#, department)
and EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = NVL(#jobId#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7)
password = #password#
UNION SELECT u.cn, u.password, u.displayname, u.displayname2, d.cn department, d.displayname description, d.displayname2 description2, b.title as title, b.title2 as title2, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyid, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 company, d.COMPNM2 company2, u.updatedt, case u.department when #deptID# then u.extensionattribute1 else b.ROLL_INFO end as rollinfo, u.telephonenumber, u.mail, u.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, u.tenant_id, concat('top,Top,', d.dept_cd_path) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, u.loginCnt, u.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, u.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, u.extensionattribute14 as sabun, u.password_updatedt, u.mobile as mobile, u.extensionattribute5, b.jobid as jobId, b.roleId as roleId, u.upnname, b.MANUAL_FLAG AS MANUALFLAG FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER b JOIN TBL_USERMASTER u ON b.CN = u.CN AND b.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID inner join tbl_deptMaster d on (u.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) AND d.CN = b.DEPTID and b.JOBID = #jobId# WHERE (u.cn = #id# OR u.extensionattribute14 = #id#) AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.cn = #deptID# and b.jobid = #jobId#
password = #password#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, mobile as mobile, extensionattribute5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as roleId, upnname, MANUAL_FLAG AS MANUALFLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
and department = NVL(#deptID#, department)
and EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = NVL(#jobId#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7)
password = #password#
UNION SELECT u.cn, u.password, u.displayname, u.displayname2, d.cn department, d.displayname description, d.displayname2 description2, b.title as title, b.title2 as title2, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyid, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 company, d.COMPNM2 company2, u.updatedt, case u.department when #deptID# then u.extensionattribute1 else b.ROLL_INFO end as rollinfo, u.telephonenumber, u.mail, u.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, u.tenant_id, concat('top,Top,', d.dept_cd_path) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, u.loginCnt, u.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, u.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, u.extensionattribute14 as sabun, u.password_updatedt, u.mobile as mobile, u.extensionattribute5, b.jobid as jobId, b.roleId as roleId, u.upnname, b.MANUAL_FLAG AS MANUALFLAG FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER b JOIN TBL_USERMASTER u ON b.CN = u.CN AND b.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID inner join tbl_deptMaster d on (u.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) AND d.CN = b.DEPTID and b.JOBID = #jobId# WHERE u.cn = #id# AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.cn = #deptID# and b.jobid = #jobId#
password = #password#
SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn != 'masteradmin' AND password IS NULL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONNECTION_INFO( USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, TITLE, TITLE2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, CONNECTIP, CONNECTTIME, CONNECTBROWSER, CONNECTOS, CONNECTAGENT, TENANT_ID, STATUS, SESSIONCODE ) VALUES( #id#, #displayName1#, #displayName2#, #deptID#, #deptName1#, #deptName2#, #title1#, #title2#, #companyID#, #companyName1#, #companyName2#, #ip#, utc_timestamp(), #browser#, #os#, #agent#, #tenantId#, #status#, #sessionCode# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CONNECTION_INFO SET DISCONNECTTIME = utc_timestamp() WHERE SESSIONCODE = #sessionCode# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CONNECTION_INFO SET SESSIONCODE = #ezSessionId# WHERE SESSIONCODE = #sessionCode# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SESSION( SESSION_ID, LOGINCOOKIE, CREATION_TIME, LAST_ACCESS_TIME, MAX_INACTIVE_INTERVAL ) VALUES( #ezSessionId#, #loginCookie#, utc_timestamp(), utc_timestamp(), (SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = #type# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_SESSION SET LAST_ACCESS_TIME = utc_timestamp()
LOGINCOOKIE = #loginCookie#
WHERE SESSION_ID = #ezSessionId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SESSION_ID, LOGINCOOKIE, CREATION_TIME, LAST_ACCESS_TIME, MAX_INACTIVE_INTERVAL, (timestampdiff(minute, LAST_ACCESS_TIME, utc_timestamp())) AS TIME_DIFF, TYPE FROM TBL_SESSION WHERE SESSION_ID = #ezSessionId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SESSION WHERE LAST_ACCESS_TIME <= DATE_SUB(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL #dbSessionStoragePeriod# DAY)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET ipaddress = #ip#, lastlogin = utc_timestamp(), logincnt = logincnt + 1 WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET ipaddress = #ip#, lastlogin = utc_timestamp(), logincnt = logincnt - 1 WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET password = #password#, password_updatedt = utc_timestamp() WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SERVER_NAME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME WHERE SERVER_NAME = #serverName#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, mobile, extensionattribute5, extensionattribute7 as jobId, extensionattribute8 as roleId, upnname FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE cn = #id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, mobile, extensionattribute5, extensionattribute7 as jobId, extensionattribute8 as roleId, upnname FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE (DEPARTMENT = #id# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 LIKE CONCAT('%',#id#, '%')) AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, mobile, extensionattribute5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as roleId, upnname FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #company_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT FIDO_SESSION_ID, USER_ID, CREATE_TIME, ACCESS_IP, STATUS FROM tbl_fido_session WHERE fido_session_id = #fidoSessionId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FIDO_SESSION SET STATUS = #status# WHERE FIDO_SESSION_ID = #fidoSessionId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FIDO_SESSION WHERE CREATE_TIME <= DATE_SUB(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL #fidoStoragePeriod# DAY)
sqlMap.select: SELECT START_IP, END_IP, START_IP_NUMBER, END_IP_NUMBER, COUNTRY_CODE, COUNTRY_NAME FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_COUNTRYIP WHERE #loginIP# BETWEEN START_IP_NUMBER AND END_IP_NUMBER

SELECT a.cn, a.password, a.displayname, a.displayname2, a.department, a.description, a.description2, a.title, a.title2, a.physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, a.company, a.company2, a.updatedt, a.extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, a.telephonenumber, a.mail, a.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, a.tenant_id, (SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND property_name = 'PrimaryLang') AS primaryLang, a.loginCnt, a.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, a.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, a.extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, a.mobile, a.extensionattribute5 FROM TBL_USERMASTER a LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE b ON a.CN = b.CN AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID WHERE (a.cn = #id# OR LOWER(a.extensionattribute14) = #id#) AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND b.cn IS NULL
password = #password#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FIND_PWD SET CERTIFICATION = #certification# WHERE SABUN = #sabun# AND CERTIFICATION_NUM = #certificationNum#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SABUN , REQ_DATE , CERTIFICATION_NUM , CERTIFICATION , PHONE_NUM FROM TBL_FIND_PWD A WHERE sabun = #sabun# ORDER BY REQ_DATE DESC limit 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET logincnt = logincnt + 1 WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_DEV_MASTER WHERE USERID = #CN#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SAML_REQUEST_ID (REQUEST_ID, CREATE_DT) VALUES (#requestId#, NOW())
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SAML_REQUEST_ID WHERE REQUEST_ID = #requestId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SAML_REQUEST_ID WHERE CREATE_DT < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
